name: Engram Memory
description: Deterministic long-term memory served from a local sidecar: role-scoped recall, zero cloud calls, and a decision ledger that explains every keep, merge, and drop.

persona.label: Agent Persona
persona.help: One sentence: what is this agent? Domain and memory scope are derived automatically.

dbPath.label: Database Path
dbPath.help: SQLite store for this agent's memory. Point multiple integrations at one file to share a store.

agentId.label: Agent Id
agentId.help: Identity used for lane scoping and provenance inside the store

pythonPath.label: Python Interpreter
pythonPath.help: Optional explicit interpreter with engram-lite installed. When omitted, the plugin tries `engram` on PATH, then uvx, then pipx.

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Inject role-scoped memories into context before each prompt

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Capture durable facts from user messages after each agent run

allowDownload.label: Allow Engine Download
allowDownload.help: Off by default: the plugin never fetches anything on its own. When enabled, uvx/pipx may download the version-pinned engram-lite release if the engine is not installed.

topK.label: Recall Depth
topK.help: Maximum memories injected per prompt from search

bootK.label: Boot Depth
bootK.help: Maximum lane-snapshot memories injected once per session

startupTimeoutMs.label: Sidecar Startup Timeout (ms)
startupTimeoutMs.help: How long to wait for the memory sidecar to come up (first uvx run may download the package)
